metadata.author: ziIIas
metadata.title: zilla's Rules
metadata.description: Comprehensive rules for text processing and corrections, organized by category

rules.description: Beginning of line capitalization (skip if ZWSP or asterisk before letter)
rules.replace: function(match, prefix, letter) { if (/\d/.test(prefix)) { return match; } if (/[a-z]\s+$/i.test(prefix)) { return match; } if (prefix.endsWith('\u200B')) { return match; } if (prefix.endsWith('*')) { return match; } return prefix + letter.toUpperCase(); }

rules.description: n't contractions (aint, arent, cant, couldnt, didnt, doesnt, dont, hadnt, havent, hasnt, isnt, mustnt, shouldnt, wasnt, werent, wont, wouldnt)

rules.replace: function(match) { if (match === 'GON') return "GON'"; if (match === 'Gon') return "Gon'"; return "gon'"; }
function(match) { if (match === 'FUCKIN') return "FUCKIN'"; if (match === 'Fuckin') return "Fuckin'"; return "fuckin'"; }
function(match) { if (match === 'TIL') return "'TIL"; if (match === 'Til') return "'Til"; return "'til"; }
function(match) { if (match.toUpperCase() === match) return 'TILL'; if (match[0] === match[0].toUpperCase()) return 'Till'; return 'till'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'CAUSE') return "'CAUSE"; if (match === 'Cause') return "'Cause"; return "'cause"; }

function(match, existingApostrophe) { const apostrophe = existingApostrophe ? existingApostrophe : "'"; if (match === "'CUZ" || match === "CUZ") return apostrophe + "cause"; if (match === "'Cuz" || match === "Cuz") return apostrophe + "cause"; return apostrophe + "cause"; }
function(match) { if (match === 'BOUT') return "'BOUT"; if (match === 'Bout') return "'Bout"; return "'bout"; }
function(match) { if (match === 'FORE') return "'FORE"; if (match === 'Fore') return "'Fore"; return "'fore"; }

ruleGroups.title: Spelling & Word Fixes
ruleGroups.description: Rules for fixing common spelling issues
ruleGroups.author: ziIIas

rules.replace: function(match) { if (match === 'OK') return 'OKAY'; if (match === 'Ok') return 'Okay'; return 'okay'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'SUMN') return "SOMETHIN'"; if (match === 'Sumn') return "Somethin'"; return "somethin'"; }
function(match) { if (match === 'YUH') return 'YEAH'; if (match === 'Yuh') return 'Yeah'; return 'yeah'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'YEA') return 'YEAH'; if (match === 'Yea') return 'Yeah'; return 'yeah'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'AYE' || match === 'AY') return 'AYY'; if (match === 'Aye' || match === 'Ay') return 'Ayy'; return 'ayy'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'HOE') return 'HO'; if (match === 'Hoe') return 'Ho'; return 'ho'; }
function(match) { if (match === "HO'") return 'HO'; if (match === "Ho'") return 'Ho'; return 'ho'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'LIL' || match === "LI'L") return "LIL'"; if (match === 'Lil' || match === "Li'l") return match; return "lil'"; }
function(match) { if (match === 'WHOA') return 'WOAH'; if (match === 'Whoa') return 'Woah'; return 'woah'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'DAWG') return 'DOG'; if (match === 'Dawg') return 'Dog'; return 'dog'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'CHOPPA') return 'CHOPPER'; if (match === 'Choppa') return 'Chopper'; return 'chopper'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'OUGHTTA') return 'OUGHTA'; if (match === 'Oughtta') return 'Oughta'; return 'oughta'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'NAÏVE') return 'NAIVE'; if (match === 'Naïve') return 'Naive'; return 'naive'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'ALL RIGHT') return 'ALRIGHT'; if (match === 'All Right' || match === 'All right') return 'Alright'; return 'alright'; }
function(match) { if (match === 'CLICHE') return 'CLICHÉ'; if (match === 'Cliche') return 'Cliché'; return 'cliché'; }

rules.description: Curly double quotes -> straight double quotes
Em dash before comma -> em dash

rules.replace: function(match) { const n = parseInt(match); if (n === 9 || n === 12) return match; const ones = ['zero','one','two','three','four','five','six','seven','eight','nine','ten','eleven','twelve','thirteen','fourteen','fifteen','sixteen','seventeen','eighteen','nineteen']; const tens = ['','','twenty','thirty','forty','fifty','sixty','seventy','eighty','ninety']; if (n === 100) return 'a hundred'; if (n < 20) return ones[n]; if (n % 10 === 0) return tens[n/10]; return tens[Math.floor(n/10)] + '-' + ones[n%10]; }
